title: Pachystrobilus involucratus
taxonomy: Pachystrobilus involucratus is classified as a genus within the family Podocarpaceae, which is a group of coniferous plants. This genus is native to the subtropical regions of East Asia. The classification of Pachystrobilus involucratus is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the division Pinophyta. It belongs to the class Pinopsida and the order Pinales. The family Podocarpaceae comprises about 17 genera of coniferous plants, with Pachystrobilus involucratus being one of them.
